title: Virus & Malware Removal
headline: Clean infections, restore trust, and lock down your devices professionally.
description: Professional virus and malware removal for laptops and desktops, serving Ocala, Belleview, The Villages, and surrounding Central Florida communities, including threat removal, system recovery, and post-cleanup hardening to prevent reinfection.

sections.heading: Did You Know?
paragraph: Many modern threats bypass antivirus software by hiding in trusted folders, memory, or scheduled tasks.
Malware can silently log keystrokes, steal browser data, or connect your device to a botnet without showing obvious symptoms.
Some infections can survive reboot, antivirus scans, or even factory resets, requiring professional remediation.

sections.heading: What We Do
paragraph: We remove active malware, repair system damage, and secure your computer against future attacks using proven, security-first methods.
items: Full wipe-and-rebuild option for deeply compromised systems

sections.heading: How It Works
paragraph: We assess your system to determine infection severity and recommend the safest remediation path.
If advanced compromise is suspected, we explain rebuild options and secure data handling.
After cleanup, we harden the system to reduce future infection risk.
